reach_why: Extends familiar proxy-optimization and selection-bias concerns, but does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links fallibilism, proxy feedback, layered filtering, and rhetorical thought-experiment mimicry into one critique.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing proxy-optimized outputs against truth-tracking performance and measuring suppression of awkward but correct ideas.
explanation: Proxy-optimized explanation systems can reward persuasive near-misses while filtering out initially awkward truths.
